programme.desc: Jay's question puts Rachel on the spot, and Chris turns Frank's offer down. At the Woolpack, Shirley is disguised to put a plot in motion(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Julie is shattered when her past catches up with her, Josh's invitation leaves Kathy on the hop, and the authors of Beckindale's scandal sheet are finally caught out(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Charlie is stuck in France and unable to take Bet to the ball. Liz and Steve move out of the Queens and back to number 11. Kevin is stunned to discover his fine has been paid(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Charlie spends the night at the Rovers, Alma refuses to let Kevin pay her the money back, and Sally is upset that she will not see Jonathan again(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny falls victim to conmen who have devised an elaborate loan and savings racket to fleece unwitting villagers. Meanwhile, Vernon, Bernie and David put their literary prowess to the test by entering a poetry competition run by the Ashfordly Gazette. Rural drama, starring Sarah Tansey and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An archaeologist dies of a heart attack shortly after smashing the seal of an ancient Egyptian tomb, raising the spectre of the mummy's curse. The grieving widow summons the Belgian sleuth to unravel the mystery, but he can only smoke out the real villain by risking his own life. David Suchet stars, with Anna Cropper and Bill Bailey(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A college dean is found bludgeoned to death in local woodland, following a heated pub debate. When an alchemic image is discovered by the body, denoting the first of four stages of a process called 'The Magnum Opus', the detectives realise that there are three more murders to follow. Before any more crimes are committed, the team must uncover the guilty secret that the victims share in order to learn the identity of the killer and the potential victims(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a toddler goes missing from a high-street merry-go-round, his distraught mother reports him kidnapped and a massive police hunt is launched to track him down. However, with more than one suspect and no physical evidence, the search throws up more questions than answers - especially as the boy's mum seems to be hiding something. Crime drama, starring Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A call girl is found murdered at an upmarket apartment, apparently the victim of a client who risks losing everything if his secret obsession with the woman is revealed. Leading the cross-examination, Phillips begins to suspect someone had a reason to frame the accused, and doggedly pursues the truth. Guest starring Greg Wise, with Bradley Walsh and Freema Agyeman(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan is offered a job in a car factory in the midlands and decides the best way to quit his job at the bus depot is by getting himself sacked in order to earn an extra week's wages. Reg Varney stars(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: When Larry decides to use someone else's name instead of his own, Robin finds himself entangled in a love triangle. Comedy series, with Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Crane and Merton have their hands full when a sniper strikes during a clay-pigeon shoot, and Bellamy's fiery temper only serves to make matters worse. Elsewhere, Vernon decides to venture into the B&B market - but his cooking skills leave a lot to be desired. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell, Mark Jordon and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: It is Chris's first day in his new job, and Frank spots an old flame. At Emmerdale, it seems as though Sarah's having second thoughts(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah's plans go awry when three becomes a crowd. Disaster befalls the Windsors on their big day. At Home Farm, Frank is astounded by Jack's change of heart(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is annoyed when Mike refuses to talk about his cash flow problem. Sally wants Kevin to apologise to Joe. Maureen is upset when Reg does not invite Curly to the wedding(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma offers to remortgage the cafe for Mike but he refuses. Reg is upset to find no one has prepared a farewell party for him. Kevin confronts Sally about Joe(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Schoolgirl Jennifer Sutcliffe becomes embroiled in a mystery when priceless jewels are hidden among her belongings. The precious stones once belonged to a prince who fell foul of a revolution, and now his cousin is a pupil at the same school as Jennifer, where Poirot finds himself drawn into the unlikely situation and realises nothing is quite what it seems. David Suchet stars as the Belgian sleuth, with Harriet Walter and Claire Skinner(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Crane and Merton have their hands full when a sniper strikes during a clay-pigeon shoot, and Bellamy's fiery temper only serves to make matters worse. Elsewhere, Vernon decides to venture into the B&B market - but his cooking skills leave a lot to be desired. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell, Mark Jordon and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: An unusual message appears in Chipping Cleghorn's local newspaper, revealing details of a forthcoming murder and, while at first glance it looks like a practical joke, the information proves to be deadly accurate. Miss Marple helps Inspector Craddock with his investigation and the pair soon uncover several likely suspects in the village. Feature-length drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Zoe Wanamaker, Elaine Paige, Virginia McKenna, Cherie Lunghi and Frances Barber(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When Grace Phillips is killed in an explosion in a munitions factory, Foyle is asked by one of her co-workers to investigate the death. Initially he concludes a tragic accident has occurred until another woman is found murdered and Foyle starts to believe the deaths are connected. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen(n)

programme.desc: Des offers Jack his help in demanding access to Tommy. Curly fends off rumours of redundancy and is stunned when Reg tells him the rumours are true. Don writes Denise a letter(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don makes an effort to be nice to Ivy. Curly receives the redundancy list from Head Office, and it includes Maureen's name. Bet is pleased when Charlie asks her out for dinner(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack swallows his pride, while Turner is proud to bring his new friend home. At Home Farm, it is the end of the world for Elizabeth as Frank gives her some devastating news(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Windsors are finding country life a strain, while Julie's anxiety brings back memories for Nick. Annie is on the move, and the Sugdens are reconciled by a special gift(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Merrick faces a testing time when a terrified hospital patient claims her husband is trying to kill her, but Merton seems reluctant to get involved, while Vernon picks up a bargain all-purpose pest-control solution, enlisting David's help in his eradication mission. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Charlie is stuck in France and unable to take Bet to the ball. Liz and Steve move out of the Queens and back to number 11. Kevin is stunned to discover his fine has been paid(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Charlie spends the night at the Rovers, Alma refuses to let Kevin pay her the money back, and Sally is upset that she will not see Jonathan again(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jay's question puts Rachel on the spot, and Chris turns Frank's offer down. At the Woolpack, Shirley is disguised to put a plot in motion(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Julie is shattered when her past catches up with her, Josh's invitation leaves Kathy on the hop, and the authors of Beckindale's scandal sheet are finally caught out(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny falls victim to conmen who have devised an elaborate loan and savings racket to fleece unwitting villagers. Meanwhile, Vernon, Bernie and David put their literary prowess to the test by entering a poetry competition run by the Ashfordly Gazette. Rural drama, starring Sarah Tansey and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Blakey organises an exhibition as the bus company celebrates its half-centenary. Stan reminisces, and on falling asleep finds himself at the wheel of a bus from the turn of the 20th century. Comedy. starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan is offered a job in a car factory in the midlands and decides the best way to quit his job at the bus depot is by getting himself sacked in order to earn an extra week's wages. Reg Varney stars(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: When Larry decides to use someone else's name instead of his own, Robin finds himself entangled in a love triangle. Comedy series, with Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Crane and Merton have their hands full when a sniper strikes during a clay-pigeon shoot, and Bellamy's fiery temper only serves to make matters worse. Elsewhere, Vernon decides to venture into the B&B market - but his cooking skills leave a lot to be desired. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell, Mark Jordon and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: It is Chris's first day in his new job, and Frank spots an old flame. At Emmerdale, it seems as though Sarah's having second thoughts(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah's plans go awry when three becomes a crowd. Disaster befalls the Windsors on their big day. At Home Farm, Frank is astounded by Jack's change of heart(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is annoyed when Mike refuses to talk about his cash flow problem. Sally wants Kevin to apologise to Joe. Maureen is upset when Reg does not invite Curly to the wedding(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma offers to remortgage the cafe for Mike but he refuses. Reg is upset to find no one has prepared a farewell party for him. Kevin confronts Sally about Joe(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Schoolgirl Jennifer Sutcliffe becomes embroiled in a mystery when priceless jewels are hidden among her belongings. The precious stones once belonged to a prince who fell foul of a revolution, and now his cousin is a pupil at the same school as Jennifer, where Poirot finds himself drawn into the unlikely situation and realises nothing is quite what it seems. David Suchet stars as the Belgian sleuth, with Harriet Walter and Claire Skinner(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Crane and Merton have their hands full when a sniper strikes during a clay-pigeon shoot, and Bellamy's fiery temper only serves to make matters worse. Elsewhere, Vernon decides to venture into the B&B market - but his cooking skills leave a lot to be desired. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell, Mark Jordon and Geoffrey Hughes(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: An unusual message appears in Chipping Cleghorn's local newspaper, revealing details of a forthcoming murder and, while at first glance it looks like a practical joke, the information proves to be deadly accurate. Miss Marple helps Inspector Craddock with his investigation and the pair soon uncover several likely suspects in the village. Feature-length drama, starring Geraldine McEwan, with Zoe Wanamaker, Elaine Paige, Virginia McKenna, Cherie Lunghi and Frances Barber(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When Grace Phillips is killed in an explosion in a munitions factory, Foyle is asked by one of her co-workers to investigate the death. Initially he concludes a tragic accident has occurred until another woman is found murdered and Foyle starts to believe the deaths are connected. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen(n)

programme.title: Kojak

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry fall under the spell of a bewitching Australian beauty who has ventured from Down Under in search of her missing fiance. However, she may just happen to be concealing an ulterior motive. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw(n)

programme.title: The Professionals

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. programme.title: Snooker: Champion of Champions Live
programme.desc: Jill Douglas introduces coverage of the evening session on day three from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring a group-stage final, as the players contest a place in the last four. Kyren Wilson was in highly impressive form at this stage last year, thrashing current world champion Judd Trump 6-1. The other players to progress to the next stage were Shaun Murphy, Ronnie O'Sullivan, and Mark Allen, after they recorded victories over Ding Junhui, John Higgins, and Neil Robertson respectively. Presented by Jill Douglas, with analysis from Stephen Hendry, Neal Foulds and Alan McManus, and commentary by Clive Everton, David Hendon and Phil Yates(n)

Thriller, with Steven Seagal, Kelly LeBrock, Bill Sadler and Frederick Coffin(n)

Seven years later, he regains consciousness and gets ready to exact a grisly payback on the murderers. As he embarks on his deadly mission of vengeance, he learns his son also survived the attack, but was told he is dead. Thriller, with Steven Seagal, Kelly LeBrock, Bill Sadler and Frederick Coffin(n)

programme.title: Eraser (1996)
programme.desc: An arms industry executive is placed in danger after she exposes evidence of illegal deals by an international corporation. The authorities respond by assigning her to the custody of a government agent who specialises in helping federal witnesses disappear from the system. However, when the operative is framed for murder, he is forced to balance his duties with efforts to clear his own name. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, James Caan, Vanessa L Williams and James Coburn(n)

The first episode examines the case of a teenager cheated out of her grandfather's inheritance by her own dad and stepmother. The pair forged signatures and lied to solicitors and banks to steal the money, then frittered it away on luxuries and paying off their own debts. programme.title: British Airways: 100 Years in the Sky

programme.title: How to Lose a Stone in a Month

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Millionaire property developer Immanuel Ezekiel and his adult children, who reside in a penthouse in an exclusive area of London, swap homes, lives and budgets with single mum Amy Impey and her two kids, who live on the breadline in a council property in Boreham Wood. While the former thinks nothing of spending half the year travelling, the latter cannot even afford a day out in London. How will the privileged Ezekiels manage with a very limited budget, and will a week in property inspire Amy on to bigger and better things?(n)

programme.desc: In Dartmoor National Park, Sally Lindsay, Nigel Havers and poodle Charlie explore Bovey Castle, a luxury golf and spa resort occupying a former manor house, which is one of the few posh hotels where man's best friend is also welcomed. Nigel's suite comes with a complimentary Barbour jacket for Charlie, which he wears while enjoying a spot of deerstalking. Sally prepares a venison dinner for the hunters' return, part of a £500-per-head dining experience, before enjoying a round of golf on Bovey's famous championship course, a favourite with professional players and celebrities alike(n)

programme.title: Eamonn & Ruth: How the Other Half Lives
programme.desc: Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford return to explore the extravagant lifestyles of the super-rich, beginning by heading to the largest city in the United Arab Emirates. After experiencing a luxury night under the stars in the desert, they visit the Burj Khalifa - the tallest building in the world - to meet a multimillionaire who calls it home.(n)

programme.title: In Therapy
programme.desc: The model and reality star talks to psychotherapist Mandy Saligari, determined to shed his playboy image. He chose not to follow his father George into the world of sport and became famous as a lothario and party animal, with his alcohol and drug battles laid bare across the tabloid newspapers in the noughties. Opening up about his demons does not prove to be easy for him, and he admits he doesn't trust anyone and has commitment issues(n)

programme.desc: The death of Special Agent Ned Dorneget hits the team hard, and when Gibbs receives a visit from his late colleague's mother - CIA Officer Joanna Teague - he must decide whether to let her help with the investigation into the Calling. Meanwhile, Gibbs hopes his young charge Luke, formerly one of the Calling's radicalised footsoldiers, might be key to bringing the organisation down. However, when the terrorists discover where their defecting comrade has taken refuge, the abduct him and flee to Iraq. The team follows hot on their heels, but it seems Luke's ties to the Calling might be stronger than anyone at NCIS ever anticipated. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, with guest Mimi Rogers(n)

programme.title: The Gadget Show
programme.desc: Jon Bentley and BBC 1Xtra DJ and part-time TV reviewer Sideman Allday find out how tech can help avoid overly pricey TV subscriptions. Georgie Barrat appraises Segway's latest personal transport kit, which 'follows' people around even when not being ridden. Ortis Deley heads for the hills to test out Google's latest mapping innovation, which allows anyone to record 'street view' themselves. Plus, the G Team goes back to university, hoping to teach a group of second-year students how to cook with three of the hottest kitchen gadgets around. Presented by Craig Charles(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A stunning journey in New Zealand, through the heart of South Island's best scenery. It starts in Greymouth, renowned for its coal mining past, moving on to Arthur's Pass National Park - with its historically important Maori hunting grounds. The train passes through Cass, made famous by Kiwi artist Rita Angus and onwards to the Waimakiriri gorge and its 15 tunnels and four viaducts. Rail engineers recall how the line has been affected by earthquakes before the journey arrives in Christchurch, a city sitting on a volcano. Narrated by Bill Nighy(n)

programme.title: Caravanning with Shane Richie
programme.desc: The Isle of Wight is where Shane holidayed as a child, and where he began his career, staying in a unique, rock 'n' roll-themed caravan complete with its own hot tub. On his first day, Shane revisits his past with a visit to the pier at Sandown, where he did his earliest professional performances. Back at the holiday park, Shane enjoys an evening at the park's outdoor cinema, meeting both the holidaymakers who have come along and the staff keeping them entertained. He is later joined by TV chef Tony Tobin to forage along the shoreline for edible seaweed(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Dale Winton narrates a compilation of disastrous game show moments. Featuring contestants on The Million Pound Drop failing to pay attention to a question with a fortune at stake, the least successful player to appear on The Chase, the woman who broke her leg on The Krypton Factor and still finished third, Catchphrase host Nick Weir damaging his career by falling down the stairs, and the Princess Diana-themed episode of Channel 5 quiz show 100%(n)

programme.title: The Wonderful Country (1959)
programme.desc: A solitary gunman lies low for years in Mexico hiding out from the American authorities, until circumstances force him to return to the US - where he reluctantly agrees to take on dangerous work with a team of Texas Rangers patrolling the border. Western, starring Robert Mitchum, Julie London, Pedro Armendariz and Jack Oakie(n)

programme.title: A Man Alone (1955)
programme.desc: A gunman stumbles across the bodies of passengers murdered in a stagecoach robbery. Riding to the nearest town to report the crime, he finds himself accused of the killings and faces a battle to prove his innocence. Western, directed by and starring Ray Milland, with Raymond Burr, Lee Van Cleef, Mary Murphy and Ward Bond(n)

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe on Mars (1964)
programme.desc: Stranded on Mars with only a monkey as a companion, an astronaut has to quickly figure out how to survive a lack of oxygen, food and water on the lifeless planet. Sci-fi drama, inspired by Daniel Defoe's classic tale, starring Paul Mantee, Adam West and Victor Lundin(n)

programme.title: Decision at Sundown (1957)
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into a backwoods town intent on finding his dead wife's former lover and exacting revenge for her death. The man he blames now has total control of the town and has the sheriff at his beck and call. Undeterred, the drifter offers his enemy an ultimatum - he has until sundown to leave the town or face retribution for his crimes. Western, with Randolph Scott, John Carroll and Andrew Duggan(n)

programme.title: Harry and the Hendersons (1987)
programme.desc: A hapless family's camping holiday in the mountains is brought to a sudden end when they accidentally hit the legendary Bigfoot with their car. They decide to adopt the endearing creature, but have more trouble than expected trying to keep him concealed and to avoid arousing their neighbours' suspicions. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Melinda Dillon, David Suchet, Don Ameche and Kevin Peter Hall(n)

programme.title: 47 Metres Down (2017)
programme.desc: Two sisters vacationing in Mexico are trapped in a shark cage at the bottom of the ocean. With less than an hour of oxygen left and great white sharks circling nearby, they must fight to survive. Horror, starring Mandy Moore, Claire Holt and Matthew Modine(n)

programme.title: World War Z (2013)
programme.desc: A virus sweeps across the globe, turning everyone infected into mindless, ravening zombies. As entire countries fall into chaos, a United Nations investigator sets off on a journey around the world to discover the cause of the pandemic and hopefully find a cure before human civilisation is brought to an end. Thriller based on the novel by Max Brooks, starring Brad Pitt and Mireille Enos(n)

programme.title: I Give It a Year (2013)
programme.desc: A couple marry after a whirlwind romance, but family and friends have doubts about the relationship. As their first anniversary approaches, they both begin to wonder if they are right for each other, especially when faced with more appealing alternative partners. Romantic comedy, with Rose Byrne, Rafe Spall, Anna Faris and Simon Baker(n)

programme.title: Moonrise (1948)
programme.desc: A man is haunted by the fact that his late father was a murderer, something no-one will ever let him forget. His problems are further compounded when he accidentally kills a man in self-defence - and realising people will think it was malicious, he decides to hide the body. Drama, starring Dane Clark, Gail Russell and Ethel Barrymore(n)

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon (1942)
programme.desc: The sleuth and his indefatigable sidekick Watson are employed by the British government to smuggle the mastermind behind an experimental weapon out of Switzerland before he falls into the hands of the Nazis. When the scientist disappears, Holmes faces a showdown with an old enemy. Mystery thriller, starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce(n)

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror By Night (1946)
programme.desc: The sleuth and his faithful sidekick Dr Watson hunt for the killer of an aristocrat who hired them to keep a priceless diamond out of the hands of thieves. Mystery, starring Basil Rathbone, Nigel Bruce, Alan Mowbray, Dennis Hoey and Mary Forbes(n)

programme.title: Thunder Over Arizona (1956)
programme.desc: An honest cowboy is mistaken for the notorious outlaw he killed in self-defence. Before he can clear up the misunderstanding, he is approached by a corrupt mayor who draws him into a conspiracy to wrest control of a silver mine from its rightful owners. Western, starring Skip Homeier, Kristine Miller, George Macready and Wallace Ford(n)

programme.title: The Court-Martial of Billy Mitchell (1955)
programme.desc: In the 1920s, an American colonel accuses the war department of criminal negligence for denying the air force the funding it needs - but the powers-that-be still regard aircraft as an irrelevant part of the military, and respond by putting him on trial. Courtroom drama, starring Gary Cooper and Rod Steiger, with Ralph Bellamy and Elizabeth Montgomery(n)

programme.title: Max Steel (2016)
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old McGrath is bewildered and unsettled when he suddenly starts exuding increasingly powerful energy from his fingers. As this power grows to dangerous proportions, Max meets Steel, a small but feisty flying alien who says he can help. Family fantasy adventure, starring Ben Winchell, Maria Bello and Andy Garcia, with the voice of Josh Brener(n)

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Tim Burton and stars Eva Green, Asa Butterfield and Ella Purnell talk about making the new fantasy adventure(n)

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp(n)

programme.title: The Neon Demon (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring model arrives in Los Angeles, but her beauty and youth soon generate intense fascination and jealousy within the fashion industry. Nicolas Winding Refn's psychological horror, starring Elle Fanning, Jena Malone, Bella Heathcote, Abbey Lee, Christina Hendricks and Keanu Reeves(n)

programme.title: Ivan's Childhood (1962)
programme.desc: A Soviet youngster esacpes from a PoW camp after he is orphaned when German troops raze his village, and becomes determined to help the Red Army as a spy, with his tender years allowing him to come and go unsuspected. Andrei Tarkovsky's Second World drama, starring Kolya Burlyayev, Valentin Zubkov and Evgeniy Zharikov. In Russian(n)

programme.title: The Sound of Fury (1950)
programme.desc: A criminal recruits a hard-up family man as his accomplice in a kidnapping. But when they murder the hostage, they find themselves at the mercy of revenge-seeking mob, whose anger is stoked by the press stories of a crusading reporter determined the pair will pay the ultimate price for their crime. Depression-era drama, starring Frank Lovejoy, Lloyd Bridges, Kathleen Ryan and Richard Carlson(n)

programme.title: The Undefeated (1969)
programme.desc: A veteran Union officer crosses paths again with a former Confederate enemy years after the end of the Civil War - and their past animosity resurfaces. However, when a Mexican general takes the ex-Confederate and his men hostage, the old Union soldier debates whether to surrender his herd of horses by way of ransom. Western, with John Wayne, Rock Hudson, Lee Meriwether, Tony Aguilar and Roman Gabriel(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)

Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave(n)

However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

The programme also features a one-year-old cat that was hit by a car on its first venture outside the house, leaving it requiring emergency treatment(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: The crews are stretched to their limits as they deal with a 19-year-old man who has had a motorbike crash, and an elderly woman showing signs of a stroke, but refusing treatment(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to A&E after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton is in Darwin in Australia's Northern Territory to find out how crocodiles are farmed for their meat, while Jimmy Doherty travels to Grimsby and Iceland as he investigates whether It's possible to make oil from salmon or haddock livers instead of the more traditional cod. Plus, Matt Tebbutt examines why bagels taste so different to bread despite the ingredients being virtually the same(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Black rhino Kitani is due to give birth at Chester Zoo and help swell the ranks of this endangered species, but, having lost three previous calves, it is a worrying time and the keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan. The zoo also has four rare new arrivals called tenrecs, mysterious mammals from Madagascar and, with so little known about them, the keepers try everything they can to help them breed, while red river hog Mali has given birth to twins, but tearaway dad Confetti is a threat to his own babies(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick and his team treat Staffordshire bull terrier Lulu, who has been hit by a car and had her pelvis smashed into more than 25 pieces. The professor's only option is to pin the larger pieces back together in an operation that will require all his expertise. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Her guests are horse-mad Emily, who's 40, 56-year-old Caribbean takeaway owner Clive, 23-year-old beauty therapist Chiara and mature student and self-confessed foodie Gary. A power cut threatens to scupper Louise's night before it's even started, until her husband - and farmer - Roddy and his generator come to the rescue. Will the night impress the guests, and particularly the self-appointed Thai food expert at the table?(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The keepers try to work out why male red panda Jung is losing weight, with a full medical examination scheduled after a special diet fails to solve the problem. West African mandrill JC is being challenged for his dominant position by his sons Ludo and Jareth and, while JC is taken for some health checks, Ludo gets 'over-friendly' with his dad's girlfriend. Tempers start to fray among Chester Zoo's Humboldt penguin colony during the annual moult - can youngsters Frazzle and Munch avoid being picked on by the grown-ups?(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Basset hound Barney is 'top dog' at home, enjoying salmon and venison as some of his favourite treats. But lately Barney's vertebrae have been causing him problems and Noel Fitzpatrick needs to perform high-risk surgery using 3D-printed implants. The professor also treats a giant mastiff called Tank, who is suffering from severe arthritis and needs radical surgery on both elbows, and a family puppy who has fractured his foot jumping off a bed. Now he requires specially developed surgical treatment(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a memorable restoration project in the remote Creuse region of central France. Back in 2003, when Denise Daniel and Doug Ibbs gave up everything in the UK to start a new life abroad, they couldn't have known what was ahead of them. Falling in love with a dilapidated manor house with just four crumbling walls and half a roof, they embarked on a mission to transform it - working day and night, doing everything themselves, year after year - until slowly but surely they created a magnificent edifice out of the ruins they bought off the internet. On the 70th anniversary of the destruction of the original 19th-century building by the German army, the house finally took its finished form(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree only have a few weeks to prepare for their wedding, but the chateau is nowhere near ready to receive the 200 guests they have invited and finding reliable, affordable workers is proving difficult. Dick oversees the damming of the moat and the installation of a new, eco-friendly sewage system, while Angel turns her attention to giving the rooms a distinctive decor(n)

programme.title: The Team
programme.desc: Bob's murderer goes into hiding in the marshland and there isn't any trace of the witness Malu. The international investigation team starts working together on site, contemplating whether the massacre and Bob's murder were targeted attacks by the Caliphate Union or a xenophobic act by local neo-Nazi groups. Malu finds shelter at the village home of kind Danish woman, while drone footage gives Paula a lead to Karim, who's apparently been supporting the Caliphate Union in Syria. Crime thriller, starring Jurgen Vogel, Marie Bach Hansen and Lynn Van Royen. In English, German, Flemish, French and Danish(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. With the toughest landscape they had encountered in the nation, peopled by a rebellious tribe, it was no small task, but within a few years, the whole of Lakeland was under their control. Tony Robinson tackles the journey by himself, walking 50 miles from Penrith to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass, discovering that the Romans encountered beauty and danger in equal measure(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on a 45-mile hike through the countryside of the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the area's rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps him relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. From there, he travels up what used to be secret paths to Hever Castle and finds out how the monarch's reign brought not only huge social, political and industrial change, but also fame and disaster to the women who caught his eye He ends this leg of his journey in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions(n)

Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Dennis Farina, Michael Imperioli and Sam Waterston star(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The murder of a former drug addict uncovers an insurance racket worth millions of dollars. Initially, a rock singer whose car was used in the killing is the prime suspect, until two femmes fatales come to the fore. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes, with Vanessa Minnillo and Kim Kardashian (who both starred in Disaster Movie) and Pat Monahan (from the band Train)(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the case of a 10-month-old girl who was taken from her parents in a shopping mall. Horatio and Ryan find the baby's dummy in a park, but a DNA test on the saliva reveals she was conceived as the result of an adulterous affair. The biological father is brought in for questioning and reveals he played a part in his daughter's kidnapping, but his accomplice seems to have a hidden agenda. Guest starring Teri Polo (Meet the Parents)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Paramedics become suspicious about a baby's death, calling in Briscoe and Curtis, who discover the parents adopted the child from an illegal Russian ring. The case takes on another dimension altogether when it transpires that the crooks specialise in placing terminally ill infants with unsuspecting families. Starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the death of a female rock singer, who apparently died of an overdose of cocaine and heroin. However, their inquiry is hampered by the appearance of a retired officer using unorthodox research tactics to find out the truth. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a struggling actress in what appears to have been a bungled robbery. When a couple produce a video tape showing the thieves at work, the detectives waste little time in tracking down their suspects. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A famous, but ailing, playwright tempts fate by proposing to Jessica - and almost immediately finds himself charged with murdering his business manager. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A priest and government agents using a safe house get Jessica involved in a complicated case, in which she hears the confession of a dying assassin who is connected to a recent murder. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A witness to a jewellery store robbery that went tragically wrong fails to appear in court. McCoy suspects foul play - until it transpires the man has been on the run for the past 20 years. Police drama, guest starring Mandy Patinkin of Criminal Minds fame, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a luxury sports car dealer and identify a link between the victim's last customer and a recent spate of robberies. However, the discovery that their prime suspect has learning difficulties soon leads the team to his manipulative girlfriend. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby visits a pharmaceutical lab to investigate a murder case, but when armed men storm the facility and hold everyone hostage, she is trapped within the building with no means of communicating with the outside world. Crime drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Mark Harmon and David McCallum(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Antonio Dawson is plagued by the guilt of carrying out his own form of justice when he killed a suspect, and Superintendent Brian Kelton's race to the mayor's office hits a problem(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A waitress is found raped and murdered outside a nightclub, with suspicion falling on her ex-boyfriend. However, the detectives get a new lead when they discover the victim was in an abusive love affair with her boss, while news of her treatment is mistakenly leaked to her father - who vows to take revenge on the attacker. Joe Morton (Law & Order) guest stars, alongside Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is found murdered, and as detectives investigate the case, it is revealed she is involved in the same charitable foundation as four abduction victims. The scheme is run by a prominent physician who specialises in hormone replacement and perpetuating youth. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

Guest starring Ed Asner, who reprises a role he played in the original series in 1975(n)

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER

programme.title: Traders: Millions by the Minute
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary going inside the fast and fiercely competitive world of financial trading, meeting the men and women who play the markets in big cities around the world. New York-based Karen juggles two sets of twins, a busy social calendar and a $200million hedge fund. Bob has spent more than three decades jostling for position on Chicago's cattle futures trading floor, while London day traders Will and Piers use their expertise to train others in the art of making money from tiny moves in the markets. Narrated by Saskia Reeves(n)

programme.title: W1A
programme.desc: Spoof documentary sequel to Twenty Twelve following former Olympic Deliverance Commission chief Ian Fletcher in his new job as head of values at the BBC. After accusations of anti-Cornish bias are levelled at the corporation, Ian calls in Siobhan Sharpe of PR company Perfect Curve to advise him. Meanwhile, producer Lucy Freeman chairs a meeting about forthcoming flagship show Britain's Tastiest Village. Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes star, with Carol Vorderman appearing as herself. David Tennant narrates(n)

programme.title: W1A
programme.desc: In the wake of Wingategate, Ian heads north to Salford to appear on Woman's Hour and faces tough questions from Jenni Murray about ageism and sexism regarding the appointment of female presenters. Meanwhile, the Britain's Tastiest Village team discovers at the last minute that the indisposed Clare Balding is unexpectedly available and keen to do the show - but she turns up unannounced for a production meeting and bumps into her replacement Carol Vorderman. Spoof documentary, starring Hugh Bonneville and Jessica Hynes(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: The team returns to investigate more health stories, with Chris van Tulleken examining the intriguing idea that the way we prepare food could be damaging our health. Okay, so we all know that frying isn't as good for us as steaming, but a radical new experiment suggests that the health-conscious among us could be cutting calories by making simple adjustments to the way we prepare starchy foods. in fact, certain methods could make them healthier than anyone previously imagined. Plus, surgeon Gabriel Weston witnesses a new procedure giving new hope to paralysed people in America, and journalist Michael Mosley looks at evidence that suggests we should all be spending a sensible amount of time in the sun(n)

programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness(n)

programme.title: This World
programme.desc: More than 60 young British women have travelled to join the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant, the radical Islamist group that has seized large swathes of territory in eastern Syria and across northern and western Iraq. This documentary examines how a combination of slick marketing, social media and religious fervour has lured them there and hears from friends and family of some of the girls to reveal how the sophisticated recruiting tactics of ISIL have shattered so many lives. Part of the This World strand(n)

programme.title: Caravaggio (1986)
programme.desc: The Renaissance artist lies on his deathbed and remembers his tumultuous life. As his revolutionary approach to religious art raises controversy in the Catholic Church, the painter becomes infatuated with a married brawler, leading to a destructive love triangle. Derek Jarman's biopic, starring Nigel Terry, Sean Bean, Michael Gough and Tilda Swinton in her movie debut(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)
